coverage.rationale: All seven dimensions captured faithfully to seed structure. Industry (Technology/sector only), geography (Europe/HQ + operating), recurring matters (Contracts), stakeholders and risk appetite null per persona's explicit refusals — correctly recorded as nulls. Regulatory baseline includes GDPR, AI Act, NIS2, DSA, ePrivacy, DMA with proper provenance (tavily+hypothesis-confirm). No invented data.

efficiency.rationale: Stayed well under budget at 9 turns (target ≤14). The agent compressed phases appropriately when the user declined specifics—closing P2.5 efficiently by accepting defaults rather than drilling. No re-asks, visible loops, or single-fact turns. The agent correctly handled the 'Quiet Lawyer' persona's brevity by not probing further when the user declined and moving to the next logical phase.
